prompt: Using the provided reference image as the scene and subject base, regenerate it as a much tighter street-level candid close-up of the same 3 young women on the Seoul pedestrian street. Keep the casual conversation dynamic: 2 women leaned in on the left and center, and 1 woman on the right listening, but bring the camera much closer so their heads and upper bodies dominate the frame and the background becomes strongly blurred. Shift the styling toward softer light beige and cream outerwear while preserving the natural everyday K-streetwear feel. Intensify the warm golden-hour backlight from the left into orange rim light on hair edges, with stray hairs glowing and a cinematic, documentary-photography mood. Use shallow depth of field, compressed perspective, soft bokeh shopfronts and pedestrians behind them, subtle film grain, natural handheld framing, and imperfect candid cropping. Maintain anonymized face coverage with simple rectangular blur/mosaic blocks over all visible faces, including background pedestrians. Overall look: authentic Seoul street chat, intimate close-up, warm analog color, unstaged moment.
